query_title: A Fairly Odd Movie: Grow Up, Timmy Turner!

recommendations.title: Fido
recommendations.overview: Timmy Robinson's best friend in the whole wide world is a six-foot tall rotting zombie named Fido. But when Fido eats the next-door neighbor, Mom and Dad hit the roof, and Timmy has to go to the ends of the earth to keep Fido a part of the family. A

recommendations.title: Shaun the Sheep: The Flight Before Christmas
recommendations.overview: Shaun's seasonal excitement turns to dismay when a farmhouse raid to get bigger stockings for the flock inadvertently leads to Timmy going missing. Can Shaun get Timmy back before he becomes someone else’s present?

recommendations.title: One Crazy Summer
recommendations.overview: An aspiring teenage cartoonist and his friends come to the aid of a singer trying to save her family property from developers.

recommendations.title: Stuck in the Suburbs
recommendations.overview: Brittany Aarons  is one of the many girls who has a crush on popular singer and boy-toy Jordan Cahill. However, she is bored of living a suburban existence and seeks a little something more.

recommendations.title: Malibu Rescue
recommendations.overview: When a long list of shenanigans lands Tyler in hot water, he’s forced to suit up and spend his summer training for an elite junior lifeguard program.

recommendations.title: FairyTale: A True Story
recommendations.overview: In 1917, two children take a photograph, which is soon believed by some to be the first scientific evidence of the existence of fairies. Based on the true story of the Cottingley Fairies.

recommendations.title: Barbie Fairytopia: Magic of the Rainbow
recommendations.overview: Elina goes to a fairy school to learn dancing and fairy magic. The spring of the fairy land is soon threatened by evil Laverna who intends to prevent fairies from performing the annual vital rainbow dance. Elina must stop quarreling with her fellow s

recommendations.title: Return of the Tooth Fairy
recommendations.overview: The Tooth Fairy is back. 15 years after the events of the first movie, Corey, now grown up but mentally scarred has gone to a class reunion. However, the Tooth Fairy is back, and this time - You better have flossed properly.

recommendations.title: Legally Blondes
recommendations.overview: Moving from England to California, the youngest cousins of Elle Woods must defend themselves when their schools reigning forces turn on the girls and try to frame them for a crime.

recommendations.title: Barbie: Fairytopia
